title: The Missing Wallet
content: After leaving the supermarket, Grace realized that her wallet was gone. She checked her pockets, shopping bags, and car without success. Worried, she returned to the store and asked at the customer service desk. An employee smiled and handed her the wallet. Another customer had found it in the parking lot and turned it in immediately. Everything was still inside. Grace thanked everyone involved and left feeling grateful for the kindness of strangers.
